name: fault-injection
description: Add systematic what-if failure prompts for each changed function (dependency fails, malicious input, concurrency, filesystem)

name: security-checklist
description: Add mandatory pass/fail security checklist: hardcoded secrets, input validation, return value checks, auth, injection, logging, crypto

name: cognitive-complexity
description: Flag functions with nesting >3, >5 branches, multiple responsibilities, boolean params, long param lists

name: unenforced-invariants
description: Detect invariants claimed in comments/docstrings/names but NOT enforced by code

name: taint-tracing
description: Trace untrusted input source through transformations to sink, note where sanitization happens or doesn't

name: remove-rationalizations
description: Remove the Rationalizations table — may burn tokens without improving analysis quality

name: remove-5whys
description: Remove 5 Whys and 5 Hows references — generic frameworks may add noise for code-level analysis

name: remove-output-format
description: Remove Output Requirements section 5.4 — strict formatting may limit natural analysis depth

name: remove-completeness-checklist
description: Remove Completeness Checklist reference — enforcement overhead vs actual quality

name: state-machine-analysis
description: Add state machine transition analysis and non-blocking re-entry bug detection

name: flag-tracing
description: Add flag/boolean variable lifecycle tracing (set point, use point, corruption window)

name: buffer-lifecycle
description: Track buffer allocation size source vs write-length source across functions — flag when they derive from different computations or temporal phases (targets CVE-2023-38545-class bugs)

name: temporal-assumption-decay
description: For any value stored and used later, identify assumptions true at computation time and whether intervening calls/async phases could invalidate them before use

name: callsite-narrowing
description: When a vulnerability pattern matches, require tracing the exact call chain from public entry point to specific vulnerable function before reporting location — reduces partial-match mislocations
